name: Ramp
description: Manage corporate spend with Ramp. This official Ramp MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: RAMP_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Ramp client ID for API access.

env.name: RAMP_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Ramp client secret for API access.

env.name: RAMP_ENV
env.description: Ramp environment, usually demo or prd.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: stdio. Auth from source catalog: client credentials. Ramp public repo; README copyright Ramp Business Corporation.
